basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Ad Hoc Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) has released the official Ad Hoc Faculty Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the NIT Rourkela Ad Hoc Faculty Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a Ph.D. in the relevant discipline or a First Class Master's Degree in Management (MBA/ MHRM) with a strong academic record are eligible to apply online on or before 27 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in the relevant discipline or First Class Master's Degree in Management (MBA/ MHRM) with a strong academic record.
qualification.details: Ph.D. in the relevant discipline or First Class Master's Degree in Management (MBA/MHRM) with a strong academic record.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Ad Hoc Faculty - Human Resource Management

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Ad Hoc Faculty - Human Resource Management

salary_details.details: Consolidated pay of Rs. 70,900/- per month for Ph.D. and Rs. 57,700/- per month without Ph.D.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Rourkela to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Ad Hoc Faculty Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Rourkela Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Rourkela Ad Hoc Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Ad Hoc Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Rourkela Ad Hoc Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Rourkela to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Ad Hoc Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Ad Hoc Faculty post at NIT Rourkela?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Ad Hoc Faculty position at NIT Rourkela is 27th July 2026. Ensure you apply before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Ad Hoc Faculty?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Ad Hoc Faculty position in Human Resource Management at NIT Rourkela.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Ad Hoc Faculty post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in the relevant discipline or a First Class Master's Degree in Management (MBA/MHRM) with a strong academic record.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Ad Hoc Faculty position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is a consolidated pay of Rs. 70,900/- per month for those with a Ph.D. and Rs. 57,700/- per month for those without a Ph.D.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Rourkela Ad Hoc Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of NIT Rourkela. The application link will be available in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Ad Hoc Faculty role?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITR/ES/2026/ADHOC-FACULTY/L/2178.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Ad Hoc Faculty position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Rourkela located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Rourkela is located in Rourkela, Odisha, with the pincode 769008.
